posts.caption:
June 1944. Armada ready. Weather marginal.
Go now — or wait?
📗 Documented: the go for the sixth.

posts.title: June 1944: Eisenhower gives the go for D-Day
posts.caption:
Forecasts disagree in the details and agree on the danger.

📗 Documented baseline: after a short weather hold, the invasion is ordered for 6 June 1944.

Series: ANOR Fork / ELOSTIRION

#dday #overlord #ww2 #1944

posts.caption:
